scripts.dev:web: pnpm exec concurrently -k -n shared,web "pnpm --filter @solar-display/shared dev" "pnpm --filter @solar-display/web dev"
scripts.dev:server: pnpm exec concurrently -k -n shared,server "pnpm --filter @solar-display/shared dev" "pnpm --filter @solar-display/server dev"
scripts.build: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm run build:web && pnpm run build:server
